requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling and Ozone/HFC Controls (Uganda)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理及臭氧层/HFC管控（乌干达）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理及臭氧層/HFC管控（烏干達）

summary.en: Refrigerant safety for household refrigerators entering Uganda is governed at the appliance level by the flammable-refrigerant provisions of the UNBS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 (Annex AA: maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements). R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 safety class A3 lower flammability) is widely accepted for household refrigeration and is not subject to phase-down restrictions. At the national level, Uganda controls ozone-depleting substances and is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment (HFC phase-down) administered through the National Ozone Unit / National Environment Management Authority (NEMA); these primarily restrict HFCs/HCFCs (e.g., R-134a, R-12) rather than hydrocarbon R-600a. Manufacturers must: (1) verify the R-600a charge complies with IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits; (2) document the refrigerant designation and charge quantity in grams on the rating plate and product documentation; and (3) for any HFC-based models, confirm acceptability against Uganda's Montreal Protocol/Kigali obligations and any import controls on controlled substances.
summary.zh: 进入乌干达的家用电冰箱的制冷剂安全，在器具层面受UNBS采用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款管辖（附件AA：各隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风及点火源要求）。R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3，ISO 817安全分类A3低可燃性）被家用制冷广泛接受，且不受削减限制。在国家层面，乌干达管控消耗臭氧层物质，是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》（HFC削减）缔约方，由国家臭氧机构/国家环境管理局（NEMA）管理；这些主要限制HFC/HCFC（如R-134a、R-12）而非碳氢化合物R-600a。制造商须：（1）核实R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；（2）在铭牌及产品文件上注明制冷剂名称及充注量（克）；（3）对任何含HFC型号，须确认其符合乌干达《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》义务及对受控物质的进口管制。
summary.zht: 進入烏干達的家用電冰箱的製冷劑安全，在器具層面受UNBS採用的IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款管轄（附件AA：各隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風及點火源要求）。R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3，ISO 817安全分類A3低可燃性）被家用製冷廣泛接受，且不受削減限制。在國家層面，烏干達管控消耗臭氧層物質，是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》（HFC削減）締約方，由國家臭氧機構/國家環境管理局（NEMA）管理；這些主要限制HFC/HCFC（如R-134a、R-12）而非碳氫化合物R-600a。製造商須：（1）核實R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值；（2）在銘牌及產品文件上注明製冷劑名稱及充注量（克）；（3）對任何含HFC型號，須確認其符合烏干達《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》義務及對受控物質的進口管制。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements) — UNBS-adopted basis
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — Uganda HFC/ODS phase-down obligations administered via the National Ozone Unit / NEMA

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) requirements for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates the R-600a charge-limit and flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24. GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps, aligned with ISO 5149) provides the general refrigeration-safety framework. China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese appliance makers exporting R-600a units to Uganda are generally well-positioned on the refrigerant aspect because both China and Uganda derive their appliance-level charge limits from IEC 60335-2-24 and both are Montreal Protocol/Kigali Parties — the residual work is documentation and charge verification against the UNBS-referenced edition.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂（R-600a）要求，其中纳入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a充注量限值及可燃性规定。GB 9237（制冷系统和热泵的安全要求，参照ISO 5149）提供制冷安全的总体框架。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。出口R-600a器具至乌干达的中国制造商在制冷剂方面一般具备良好条件，因为中乌两国的器具层面充注量限值均源自IEC 60335-2-24，且均为《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》缔约方——剩余工作是依据UNBS引用版本进行文件与充注量核实。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑（R-600a）要求，其中納入了源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a充注量限值及可燃性規定。GB 9237（製冷系統和熱泵的安全要求，參照ISO 5149）提供製冷安全的總體框架。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。出口R-600a器具至烏干達的中國製造商在製冷劑方面一般具備良好條件，因為中烏兩國的器具層面充注量限值均源自IEC 60335-2-24，且均為《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》締約方——剩餘工作是依據UNBS引用版本進行文件與充注量核實。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge-limit and flammability provisions (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is documentation and verification rather than fundamental technology: (1) Uganda product documentation and the rating plate must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and the flammable-refrigerant safety precautions per IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA. (2) The R-600a charge must be verified against the Annex AA maximum limits of the IEC 60335-2-24 edition referenced by UNBS; Chinese CCC test reports configured for the China market should be checked for coverage. (3) Any models still using R-134a or another HFC must be checked against Uganda's ODS/HFC import controls under the Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment (National Ozone Unit / NEMA) — Uganda does not operate an EU-style horizontal F-Gas Regulation, so controls are exercised through Montreal Protocol implementation and import licensing rather than a single product-prohibition regulation. [NOTE: confirm the exact Uganda import-licensing position for HFC-charged appliances with the National Ozone Unit before shipment.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距在于文件与核实而非根本技术：（1）乌干达产品文件及铭牌须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷剂安全注意事项。（2）须依据UNBS引用的IEC 60335-2-24版本核实R-600a充注量是否符合附件AA最大限值；为中国市场配置的中国CCC检测报告应核对覆盖情况。（3）任何仍使用R-134a或其他HFC的型号，须依据乌干达《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》（国家臭氧机构/NEMA）下的ODS/HFC进口管制进行核对——乌干达不设欧盟式横向氟气体法规，故管控通过《蒙特利尔议定书》实施及进口许可执行，而非单一产品禁令法规。【注：出货前应向国家臭氧机构确认含HFC器具的乌干达进口许可具体立场。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距在於文件與核實而非根本技術：（1）烏干達產品文件及銘牌須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃製冷劑安全注意事項。（2）須依據UNBS引用的IEC 60335-2-24版本核實R-600a充注量是否符合附件AA最大限值；為中國市場配置的中國CCC檢測報告應核對覆蓋情況。（3）任何仍使用R-134a或其他HFC的型號，須依據烏干達《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》（國家臭氧機構/NEMA）下的ODS/HFC進口管制進行核對——烏干達不設歐盟式橫向氟氣體法規，故管控通過《蒙特利爾議定書》實施及進口許可執行，而非單一產品禁令法規。【註：出貨前應向國家臭氧機構確認含HFC器具的烏干達進口許可具體立場。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA R-600a charge limits apply via the UNBS-adopted safety standard; ODS/HFC controls under the Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment apply via National Ozone Unit / NEMA import licensing (no EU-style horizontal F-Gas Regulation)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is well-positioned for Uganda: both China and Uganda derive appliance-level charge limits from IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, and R-600a is not subject to phase-down. The residual work is documentation (refrigerant type and charge in grams on the rating plate) and verifying charge against the UNBS-referenced IEC edition. Any HFC-charged models must be checked against Uganda's Montreal Protocol/Kigali import controls (National Ozone Unit / NEMA) — Uganda has no EU-style horizontal F-Gas Regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在乌干达具备良好条件：中乌两国的器具层面充注量限值均源自IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，且R-600a不受削减约束。剩余工作是文件（在铭牌注明制冷剂类型及充注量克数）及依据UNBS引用的IEC版本核实充注量。任何含HFC型号须依据乌干达《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》进口管制（国家臭氧机构/NEMA）核对——乌干达无欧盟式横向氟气体法规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在烏干達具備良好條件：中烏兩國的器具層面充注量限值均源自IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，且R-600a不受削減約束。剩餘工作是文件（在銘牌注明製冷劑類型及充注量克數）及依據UNBS引用的IEC版本核實充注量。任何含HFC型號須依據烏干達《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》進口管制（國家臭氧機構/NEMA）核對——烏干達無歐盟式橫向氟氣體法規。
